children.text: We collect limited personal information that you choose to provide, such as your name, email address, and any details you submit through forms or messages.
We use this information to respond to inquiries, provide services, improve the website, and communicate with you when necessary.
We may also collect basic technical data such as browser type, device information, and website usage data for analytics and security purposes.
We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with trusted service providers only when necessary to operate the website or deliver services.
You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information by contacting us.
By using this website, you agree to this Privacy Policy.
By accessing or using this website, you agree to these Terms of Service.
The content on this website is provided for general information only and may be updated or changed at any time without notice.
You agree to use this website lawfully and not to misuse, disrupt, or attempt to gain unauthorized access to the website or its systems.
All content, branding, and materials on this website remain the property of their respective owner unless otherwise stated. You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute them without permission.
This website and its content are provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any direct or indirect loss arising from your use of the website.
We may suspend or terminate access to the website at any time if these terms are violated.
By using this website, you agree to these Terms of Service.
